case_title: QUINTIN DONNELLY VS. MIGUEL ANGEL GUTIERREZ-JUAREZ

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JAN-22-2019 IN DEPT. 506 -PURSUANT TO ORDER OF JAN-22-2019 CASE IS HEREBY TRANSFERRED TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION TO BE TRIED TOGETHER WITH CASE CGC-19-572714. PLAINTIFF QUINTIN DONNELLY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL GUTIERREZ-JUAREZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER RACHEL FOX. NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DONNELLY, QUINTIN AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ-JUAREZ, MIGUEL ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF MIGUEL ANGLEL GUTIERREZ-JUAREZ FOR TRANSFER AND PROPOSED ORDER TRANSFERRING SMALL CLAIMS ACTION TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. FILED BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ-JUAREZ, MIGUEL ANGEL
ORDER RE: TRANSFER TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION AND TRIED WITH CGC-19-572714. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
